item.name: Striped Peacock Bass
item.description:
Whether the stripes are meant to be attributed to the peacock or bass is still largely up for debate amongst many ichthyologists. Regardless, this moderately sized and greenish fish is quite lovely.

[Suitable for printing on medium canvases.]

fish.guide: This member of the peacock bass family is recognizable for its bold stripes, the deep green markings a stunning reflection of the lake's emerald waters. Spearfishers consider this fish one of the region's prize catches.
